subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Qablí-Akbar! The Wronged One maketh mention of thee from the precincts of His Most Great Prison, and enjoineth upon thee gracious patience [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی قبل اکبر ان المظلوم یذکرک من شطر منظره الاکبر و یامرک بالصبر الجمیل ان
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort, @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @rejection, opposition and persecution
